replies_today.reply: Former Lodi Councilman Shakir Khan committed voter fraud, registering people from Pakistan. This specific case does not support claims of California elections being broadly "rigged" by "illegals."
The "Save America Act" was highly controversial. It passed the House but failed in the Senate in June 2026 due to strong opposition. Opponents cited voter disenfranchisement.
Netanyahu has been compared to Hitler by a UN expert and Turkey's President. More definitively, the ICC issued arrest warrants for his alleged war crimes, including depriving Gazans of food.
